output.summary: Remove all fade mask elements, CSS classes, JS logic, and the wrapper div that existed solely to support them. The .swiper-slides-wrapper div was added exclusively for fade mask overlays and should be unwrapped (its child .swiper div promoted directly under .swiper-parent). All data-at-beginning/data-at-end attributes and related Swiper event handlers are fade-mask-only and should be removed.

fileChanges.description: Remove fade mask HTML elements, unwrap .swiper-slides-wrapper, remove data attributes from .swiper-parent
fileChanges.details: 1. On line 62, remove data-at-beginning="true" data-at-end="false" from the .swiper-parent div. Also remove the grid classes (grid grid-cols-1 grid-rows-1) from .swiper-parent since they were only needed for the overlay layout with fade masks. Keep 'overflow-hidden' on .swiper-parent. 2. Remove the entire .swiper-slides-wrapper div (line 90) -- unwrap it so the .swiper div (lines 91-107) sits directly inside .swiper-parent. The .swiper div already has its own classes and does not need the wrapper's 'relative overflow-hidden grid grid-cols-1 grid-rows-1' classes. 3. Delete the fade mask comment and both fade mask divs (lines 109-111): the .testimonials-fade-left div and the .testimonials-fade-right div. 4. Remove the closing for .swiper-slides-wrapper (line 112 -- the one that closes the wrapper, not the ones for .swiper or .swiper-parent). 5. Update the block docblock comment at top to remove mention of 'fade-out masks'.

fileChanges.description: Remove grid overlay classes from FilteredServerSideRender className since fade masks no longer exist
fileChanges.details: On line 296, the FilteredServerSideRender className is 'swiper-parent overflow-hidden grid grid-cols-1 grid-rows-1 relative'. Remove 'grid grid-cols-1 grid-rows-1' since those classes were only needed for the fade mask overlay layout. Keep 'swiper-parent overflow-hidden relative'. No other TSX changes needed -- the TSX does not render fade masks directly (they come from SSR/PHP).

fileChanges.description: Remove all fade mask JS logic: updateFadeMasks function, Swiper event handlers for fade masks, MutationObserver for data attribute changes
fileChanges.details:
1. Remove the three Swiper 'on' event handlers (lines 41-57): 'init' (calls updateFadeMasks), 'slideChange' (calls updateFadeMasks), 'reachBeginning' (sets data-at-beginning), and 'reachEnd' (sets data-at-end). Remove the entire 'on' property from the Swiper config object.
2. Remove the updateFadeMasks function (lines 62-68).
3. Remove the entire MutationObserver block (lines 70-95) that queries '.swiper-parent[data-at-beginning]' elements and observes data attribute changes to toggle fade mask opacity.

designDecisions.decision: Remove .swiper-slides-wrapper div entirely rather than keeping it empty
designDecisions.rationale: The .swiper-slides-wrapper was introduced in Revision 1 exclusively to isolate fade masks from navigation/pagination controls. With fade masks removed, this wrapper has no purpose. Removing it simplifies the DOM.
The grid grid-cols-1 grid-rows-1 classes on .swiper-parent were used to stack fade mask overlays on top of the carousel. Without fade masks, standard block flow is sufficient.

designDecisions.decision: Remove all data-at-beginning/data-at-end attributes and related JS
designDecisions.rationale: These data attributes existed solely to drive fade mask visibility. No other feature depends on them. The Swiper event handlers (init, slideChange, reachBeginning, reachEnd) and the MutationObserver were all fade-mask-only logic.
